*/</style><style>html,body{overflow:auto;height:100%;background:var(--background-main);-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%;text-size-adjust:100%}@media(hover: hover)and (pointer: fine){html{min-width:800px}}body{height:100vh}*{margin:0;padding:0;font-family:Satoshi}*::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px;height:4px}*::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:#fff;border-radius:4px}*::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:#605ef5;border-radius:4px}.content{display:grid;grid-template-columns:120px auto 240px;column-gap:20px;height:100vh;background-color:var(--background-secondary);padding-left:100px;padding-right:100px;padding-top:50px;padding-bottom:100px}h1{text-align:center}.check path{stroke:var(--primary-main)}.autocomplete>div>div>input{height:fit-content !important;padding:0 10px !important}.autocomplete-container .MuiSvgIcon-root{color:var(--text-secondary)}.autocomplete .MuiFormControl-root{border-radius:12px}.autocomplete .MuiSvgIcon-root{color:var(--text-primary) !important}.MuiAutocomplete-popper>div{background:var(--background-paper-7p);padding:0 !important;border-radius:16px}.MuiAutocomplete-popper ul{margin:0 !important;border-radius:16px}.MuiAutocomplete-noOptions,.MuiAutocomplete-popper li{color:var(--text-primary) !important;font-size:14px !important}.MuiAutocomplete-popper{border-radius:16px}@media(max-width: 629px){.jobDetailsColumn{width:100%}}@media(min-width: 630px)and (max-width: 839px){.jobDetailsColumn{width:70%}}@media(min-width: 840px)and (max-width: 1040px){.jobDetailsColumn{width:240px}.jobDetailsColumn:first-of-type{margin-right:60px}.jobDetailsColumn:last-of-type{margin-left:60px}}@media(min-width: 1041px){.jobDetailsColumn{width:280px}.jobDetailsColumn:first-of-type{margin-right:120px}.jobDetailsColumn:last-of-type{margin-left:120px}}input:-webkit-autofill,input:-webkit-autofill:focus{transition:background-color 600000s 0s,color 600000s 0s}input[data-autocompleted]{background-color:rgba(0,0,0,0) !important}.MuiTablePagination-selectIcon{color:var(--text-primary) !important}.MuiTablePagination-displayedRows{font-size:14px !important}.MuiTablePagination-select{min-height:auto !important}.MuiTablePagination-actions .Mui-disabled{color:var(--text-disabled) !important}.MuiTooltip-tooltip,.MuiTooltip-arrow:before{background:var(--background-main) !important;opacity:.9 !important;color:var(--text-primary) !important;border:1px solid var(--border-15p) !important;box-shadow:0 2px 8px var(--shadow-tooltip) !important}.cm-s-jupyter .highlight pre{background:var(--background-paper-10p) !important}.jp-Cell .jp-InputArea-editor{border-radius:6px !important;border-color:var(--border-15p) !important}.fullScreenDialog{padding:20px !important;top:40px !important;bottom:40px !important;left:10px !important;right:10px !important}.fullScreenDialog .MuiPaper-root{max-width:100% !important;width:100% !important;height:100% !important}.customScrollBar::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px;height:4px}.customScrollBar::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:#fff;border-radius:4px}.customScrollBar::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:#605ef5;border-radius:4px}#chartTooltip{display:none;position:fixed;background-color:var(--background-secondary);color:var(--text-primary);padding:8px 12px;border-radius:8px;font-size:14px;border:1px solid var(--border-15p);box-shadow:0 2px 8px var(--shadow-tooltip);z-index:9999}.MuiFormHelperText-root{margin-left:4px}.monospace{font-family:monospace !important}.intercom-lightweight-app-launcher{left:16px !important;bottom:16px !important}
